Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.utils

Class BaseDataBaseEntryUtils

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.db.utils.BaseDataBaseEntryUtils
All Implemented Interfaces:
DataBaseEntryUtils, DataBaseEntryUtilsOptionsOwner
Direct Known Subclasses:
BaseProxyDataBaseEntryUtils, MySQLDataBaseEntryUtils, PostgreSQLDataBaseEntryUtils, SQLiteDataBaseEntryUtils
public class BaseDataBaseEntryUtils extends Object implements DataBaseEntryUtils
